name: Memoh
description: ✨ Self hosted, always-on AI agent platform run in containers. Create multiple bots with long memory, and connect them to Telegram, Discord, Feishu(Lark), Matrix, etc (like OpenClaw).
summaryZh: ✨ Self hosted, always-on AI agent platform run in containers. Create multiple bots with long memory, and connect them to Telegram, Discord, Feishu(Lark), Matrix, etc (like OpenClaw). 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
